data.title: Aris Mining Cuts Equity Plan Share Reserves Ahead of May AGM
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An announcement from Aris Mining ( (TSE:ARIS) ) is now available.

On April 16, 2026, Aris Mining announced it will scale back the size of its proposed equity compensation plans ahead of its May 7, 2026 annual general meeting, after concluding the originally planned share reserves were higher than needed. The revised structure cuts the stock option plan’s rolling reserve from 10% to 3% and the combined reserve for restricted and performance share units from 5% to 3%, lowering the total potential equity issuance under all plans from 10% to 6% of outstanding shares, a move likely to be viewed as shareholder-friendly in terms of dilution and governance.

The updated plans have been conditionally approved by the Toronto Stock Exchange and filed with Canadian and U.S. securities regulators, with shareholders set to vote on them at the annual meeting. Aris Mining’s board is urging investors to back the resolutions, signaling confidence that a leaner equity incentive framework can still support its long-term talent retention and growth ambitions while addressing investor sensitivity to dilution levels.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:ARIS) stock is a Buy with a C$41.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Aris Mining stock, see the TSE:ARIS Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on ARIS Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, ARIS is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by improved financial performance and a positive earnings outlook with meaningful production growth guidance, supported by strong technical uptrend signals. These positives are partially offset by expensive valuation and key risks around cash-flow durability and capital intensity required to execute the growth pipeline.

To see Spark’s full report on ARIS stock, click here.

More about Aris Mining

Aris Mining Corporation is a Canadian gold producer focused on South America, operating the Segovia and Marmato underground mines in Colombia, which together yielded about 257,000 ounces of gold in 2025. Listed on the Toronto and New York stock exchanges under the symbol ARIS, the company is advancing expansion projects at both mines to significantly lift future output and underpin a long-term growth profile.

Average Trading Volume: 1,279,578

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$5.75B

For a thorough assessment of ARIS stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Universus Photo Imagings Appeal Withdrawn, NCLT Order Stands
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest update is out from Universus Photo Imagings Ltd ( (IN:UNIVPHOTO) ).

Universus Photo Imagings Limited has announced that shareholder Ankit Jain has withdrawn his appeal before the National Company Law Appellate Tribunal, New Delhi, challenging a previous order of the National Company Law Tribunal, Allahabad. The NCLAT allowed the withdrawal on 16 April 2026, resulting in the appeal being dismissed as withdrawn.

With the dismissal of the appeal, the NCLT Allahabad order dated 15 October 2025, which was in favour of Universus Photo Imagings, remains fully operative, reinforcing the company’s legal position in the shareholder dispute. The company awaits the formal written order and has stated it will comply with any directions therein, signaling closure of this particular litigation and reduced legal overhang for stakeholders.

More about Universus Photo Imagings Ltd

Universus Photo Imagings Limited, formerly known as Jindal Photo Imaging Limited, operates in the photo imaging segment and is listed on both the National Stock Exchange of India and BSE. The company serves the Indian market from its corporate office in New Delhi and registered office in Uttar Pradesh, focusing on imaging-related products and services.

Average Trading Volume: 1,482

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: 4.61B INR

For a thorough assessment of UNIVPHOTO stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Technology & Telecommunication Acquisition Delays Quarterly Filing
data.description:
Technology & Telecommunication Acquisition ( (TETEF) ) has released a notification of late filing.

Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Technology & Telecommunication Acquisition Corporation has filed a Form 12b-25 to notify investors of a delay in its Form 10-Q (Quarter Report) for the quarter ended February 28, 2026. The company is incorporated in the Cayman Islands and operates from Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia, but says the delay does not stem from regulatory or listing compliance issues.

The firm attributes the late filing mainly to the need for more time to finalize its financial statements and related disclosures in the Form 10-Q (Quarter Report). It stresses that completing internal reviews of the quarterly numbers would have required unreasonable effort or expense to meet the original SEC deadline.

Under Rule 12b-25, the company expects to submit the Form 10-Q (Quarter Report) no later than the fifth calendar day after the prescribed due date. This short extension window suggests management believes the remaining work is procedural rather than the result of deeper accounting problems or auditor disputes.

The company indicates it does not anticipate any significant change in its operating results versus the same quarter a year earlier. No preliminary financial figures are provided, and any expectations about future performance or the absence of major variances should be viewed as forward-looking statements that could change when the full report is filed.

Technology & Telecommunication Acquisition Corporation confirms it has filed all other required periodic reports over the past 12 months, signaling an otherwise clean filing history. The notification is signed by Tek Che Ng on April 16, 2026, underscoring ongoing efforts to complete the quarterly review and bring the company back into full and timely SEC reporting compliance.

More about Technology & Telecommunication Acquisition

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $48.1M

See more data about TETEF stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: SL Green Posts Wider Loss But Reaffirms 2026 Guidance
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An announcement from SL Green Realty ( (SLG) ) is now available.

SL Green Realty Corp. reported a net loss attributable to common stockholders of $84.4 million, or $1.20 per share, for the first quarter of 2026, widening from a $21.1 million loss, or $0.30 per share, a year earlier, while funds from operations fell to $0.84 per share from $1.40, partly due to the absence of prior-year one-time income. Despite weaker earnings, the company reaffirmed its 2026 FFO guidance and highlighted robust operating momentum, including record first-quarter Manhattan office leasing of 929,264 square feet at sharply higher rents, a rise in same-store cash NOI and occupancy to 94.4% as of March 31, 2026, strategic property sales, a $1.65 billion refinancing of One Madison Avenue, a large-scale extension and cost reduction of its $2.0 billion corporate credit facility, and a 2026 common dividend level aimed at preserving liquidity for future investments.

In March 2026, SL Green entered a contract to sell the residential and retail components of 7 Dey Street for $222.6 million while retaining the office condominium, and in February it sold 690 Madison Avenue, generating $48.5 million in cash proceeds. The company also executed major leases with tenants such as Clay Labs Inc., a global investment firm and Harvey AI Corporation, supporting higher mark-to-market rents, and declared first-quarter 2026 dividends on its common and preferred stock to return capital to shareholders while maintaining flexibility for discounted debt repurchases, share buybacks or ongoing development projects.

The most recent analyst rating on (SLG) stock is a Buy with a $52.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on SL Green Realty stock, see the SLG Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on SLG Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, SLG is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by weakened financial quality—especially zero reported operating/free cash flow in 2025 and higher leverage—despite some operational improvement. Technicals remain soft with the stock below key longer-term averages. Offsetting factors include a high dividend yield and a constructive earnings-call outlook driven by leasing momentum and NOI guidance, with mixed but generally supportive corporate updates.

To see Spark’s full report on SLG stock, click here.

More about SL Green Realty

SL Green Realty Corp., a New York-based real estate investment trust, focuses on owning, managing and leasing premier office properties in Manhattan. The company generates revenue primarily from rental income and related property operations, with a growing emphasis on high-rent, long-term leases in Class A office buildings and selective asset sales and financings to optimize its portfolio and balance sheet.

Average Trading Volume: 1,417,096

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $3.16B

For an in-depth examination of SLG stock, go to TipRanks’ Overview page.

data.title: Squirrel Media Buys Programmatic Advertising Specialist in All-Share Deal
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest announcement is out from Squirrel Media SA ( (ES:SQRL) ).

Squirrel Media has agreed to acquire 100% of a leading Spanish company specializing in the planning and management of programmatic digital advertising campaigns across international markets. The target runs data-driven, automated strategies on more than €500 million of aggregated ad spend and in 2025 generated €13 million in revenue and €3.2 million in EBITDA on €25 million of managed investment, implying an EBITDA margin of 25%.

The purchase will be paid entirely in Squirrel Media shares priced at €3.20 each, with the sellers accepting a lock-up commitment on the new stock. The deal, expected to close by the end of April subject to confidentiality constraints, is positioned as a key step in Squirrel’s inorganic growth plan, deepening its digital advertising and marketing services offering and creating operational and commercial synergies across the group’s business lines.

More about Squirrel Media SA

Squirrel Media SA is a Spanish media and marketing services company focused on advertising, content, and communication solutions for brands. The group has been pursuing an inorganic growth strategy to expand its capabilities in high-value digital advertising segments and strengthen its presence in international markets.

Average Trading Volume: 17,694

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: €232.2M

data.title: Cobra Resources Raises £15,000 Through Warrant Exercise
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Cobra Resources Plc ( (GB:COBR) ) has shared an update.

Cobra Resources plc has received notices for the exercise of warrants over 750,000 new ordinary shares, raising £15,000 at an exercise price of 2 pence per share. The new shares, issued under an existing block listing, provide a modest capital injection that supports the company’s ongoing critical minerals exploration and development activities in South Australia, including its rare earths and copper projects.

The warrant exercise slightly expands Cobra’s share capital while signalling continuing investor engagement with the company’s South Australian asset base. This development underlines incremental financial support for Cobra’s strategy to progress its in situ recovery rare earth project at Boland and to advance exploration across its broader portfolio, potentially enhancing its position in the critical minerals sector.

Spark’s Take on COBR Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, COBR is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by weak financial performance (no revenue, ongoing losses, and sustained cash burn), partially mitigated by a debt-free balance sheet. Technicals are a key positive with price above major moving averages and healthy momentum. Valuation remains unattractive/unclear due to negative earnings and no dividend yield data.

To see Spark’s full report on COBR stock, click here.

More about Cobra Resources Plc

Cobra Resources plc is a South Australian critical minerals developer focused on advancing assets along the pre-production pathway. The company’s portfolio includes the Boland ionic rare earth discovery at the Wudinna Project, considered Australia’s only rare earth project suitable for in situ recovery, and the Manna Hill Copper Project, which offers potential for large-scale copper discoveries.

data.title: Eurocommercial boosts Nordic footprint with Avion Shopping Centre acquisition in Sweden
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Eurocommercial Properties NV ( (NL:ECMPA) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Eurocommercial Properties has completed the €110 million acquisition of the 45,000 sqm Avion Shopping Centre in Umeå, Sweden, from Ingka Centres, reinforcing its position as an owner-operator of dominant Nordic malls. The modern, BREEAM Excellent-certified centre, internally connected to an IKEA store and anchored by major retailers such as Willys and H&M, expands the group’s Swedish portfolio to eight shopping centres and is expected to be accretive from 2026 through active asset management and tenant mix optimisation.

The company will publish its 2025 Annual Report on 17 April 2026, providing detailed information on financial performance, leasing, occupancy, rental growth and sustainability progress, ahead of an Annual General Meeting scheduled for 2 June 2026. Eurocommercial also released its 2026 financial calendar, outlining key dates for quarterly and half-year results, ex-dividend trading and final dividend payment, offering shareholders clear visibility on upcoming corporate events.

More about Eurocommercial Properties NV

Eurocommercial Properties N.V. is a Euronext-listed property investment company specializing in shopping centres across Europe. Founded in 1991, it owns and operates 25 retail assets in Belgium, France, Italy and Sweden, with a portfolio valued at over €4 billion and a strategic focus on dominant, high-quality retail destinations.

See more data about ECMPA stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.
